changeSet.author: pc
changeSet.comment: Migrate the jobs table to the lib-jobs library schema: creator denormalized to created_by_email (no backfill; UI tolerates null), Course link generalized to scope_type/scope_id (see lib-jobs DESIGN.md 3.4/3.7)

sql.sql: UPDATE jobs SET scope_type = 'course', scope_id = course_id WHERE course_id IS NOT NULL
